testcase.name: Successful Login with Valid Credentials

Please see https://chromedriver.chromium.org/security-considerations for suggestions on keeping ChromeDriver safe. ChromeDriver was started successfully on port 4672.

testcase.name: Login Data Driven

error.message: session not created: This version of ChromeDriver only supports Chrome version 132 Current browser version is 143.0.7499.193 with binary path C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe Build info: version: '3.141.59', revision: 'e82be7d358', time: '2018-11-14T08:17:03' System info: host: 'SHRAVAN', ip: '192.168.4.135', os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '11.0.12' Driver info: driver.version: ChromeDriver remote stacktrace: GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7DDD5FBE5+28741] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7DDCC7890] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7DDB64FDA] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7DDBA6CC2] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7DDBA5D2B] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7DDBA0069] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7DDB9B399] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7DDBEB17A] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7DDBEA7B0] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7DDBDFCB3] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7DDBA9FB3] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7DDBAB331] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7DE09A73D+3414941] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7DE0AE64A+3496618] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7DE0A413D+3454365] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7DDE2848B+850155] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7DDCD37FF] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7DDCCF0C4] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7DDCCF25D] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7DDCBE079] BaseThreadInitThunk [0x00007FFFD4F7E8D7+23] RtlUserThreadStart [0x00007FFFD6E8C53C+44]
